title: Parse std first
body:
This is intended to fix https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/3864.

The change makes Verilator parse stdlib before the other input files.
If std is never used, it gets deleted right after parsing.
Std is considered as used if the design refers to symbols in std without shadowing them.

The change also adds support for --no-std flag, which disables std.
The flag has a test.

The t_std_identifier_bad test gets disabled, as now it tests general case that doesn't work (https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/3863).

The tests that grep through XML dumps got modified if their failure was caused by changes in parsing order.
I avoided using --gold or alike to do this. The file order values were all incremented by one instead, to ensure everything behaves as expected.

The test that compare their output to log files or dumps containing parsed (file names, which have changed because of inclusion of std) run with --no-std flag.

Just in case, here's a list of files in these groups:
Tests depending on parsing order:
t_clk_concat.pl, t_clk_concat_vlt.pl, t_dpi_var.pl, t_dpi_var_vlt.pl, t_func_dotted_inl0.pl, t_func_dotted_inl0_vlt.pl, t_func_dotted_inl2.pl, t_func_dotted_inl2_vlt.pl, t_inst_tree_inl0_pub0.pl, t_inst_tree_inl1_pub0.pl, t_inst_tree_inl1_pub1.pl, t_trace_public_sig_vlt.pl, t_unopt_combo_isolate.pl, t_unopt_combo_isolate_vlt.pl

Tests including parsed file names in, their .out:
t_lint_eofline.pl, t_pipe_filter.pl, t_pp_pragma_bad.pl, t_preproc_cmtend_bad.pl, t_preproc_comments.pl, t_preproc_def09.pl, t_preproc_defines.pl, t_preproc_eof3_bad.pl, t_preproc_kwd_bad.pl, t_preproc_noline.pl, t_preproc_persist.pl, t_preproc.pl, t_preproc_ttempty.pl, t_var_port_xml.pl, t_xml_debugcheck.pl, t_xml_first.pl, t_xml_flat_no_inline_mod.pl, t_xml_flat.pl, t_xml_flat_pub_mod.pl, t_xml_flat_vlvbound.pl, t_xml_output.pl, t_xml_tag.pl
